title: helichrysum grandibracteatum
intro: Helichrysum grandibracteatum, also known as the large-bracted helichrysum, is a flowering plant in the daisy family native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other compounds. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting respiratory health. Helichrysum grandibracteatum can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or oil, and is also used topically in skincare and aromatherapy products.
